body.title: Condition evaluator: _eval_condition(expr, basket) + wire to interpretive edge condition field
body.description: 3-tuple parser: key op literal (or key op key). Six operators: eq/ne/gt/lt/exists/contains. Shared helper used by conditional + branch step types. Wire to existing interpretive_edge.condition field. TYPE COERCION RULE: basket values are strings; gt/lt/ge/le coerce to float before comparison; eq/ne stay as string unless both sides parse as numeric. Define this in evaluator to prevent silent failures in count/numeric comparisons.
